response.original_title: Tenére, tenére, tenére... fino alla fine
response.overview: On the road to the Paralympic Games Paris 2024, Swiss Paralympic rower Claire Ghiringhelli confronts physical limits, private doubts, and the quiet cost of ambition. "Tenére, tenére, tenére... fino alla fine" is an intimate portrait of endurance, where holding on becomes a daily act of resistance.
response.title: Tenére, tenére, tenére... fino alla fine
